issues_found: Source is explicitly a placeholder with no actual Treasury auction data
No URL or domain specified for source attribution
Contains only development documentation text: 'This is still a placeholder dataset snapshot'
Cannot support any market structure or macro analysis
Entire record is an acknowledgment of absence rather than substantive content
human_review_reason: Record is well-constructed but source is unsuitable for archival purposes regardless of record quality

corrected_fields.summary: Source is explicitly a placeholder dataset snapshot for Treasury Securities Auctions Data with no actual auction data, dates, amounts, results, or any substantive content. The source body contains only development documentation text stating it is pending replacement with real data.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This placeholder has zero archival value and cannot serve as a research archive entry. Treasury auction data is essential for understanding primary dealer participation, auction mechanics, and government bond supply dynamics. This must be replaced with actual auction records from the treasury_fiscal_data API before archiving.
corrected_fields.market_structure_context: Treasury auction operations and primary dealer market structure cannot be assessed from this placeholder source. Actual auction data (tail, bid-to-cover, awarded amounts, auction types, bidder participation) is required for any market structure analysis.
